mapper.sql: LEFT JOIN com_code c_sns ON c_sns.grp_cd = 'SOCIAL_TYPE_CD' AND c_sns.code = m.social_cd LEFT JOIN com_code c_mem ON c_mem.grp_cd = 'MEMBERSHIP_TYPE_CD' AND c_mem.code = m.membership_cd LEFT JOIN com_code c_sub ON c_sub.grp_cd = 'SUB_STATUS_CD' AND c_sub.code = m.sub_status_cd LEFT JOIN com_code c_grd ON c_grd.grp_cd = 'MEMBER_GRADE_CD' AND c_grd.code = m.grade_cd

m.member_no, m.member_id, m.member_nm, m.real_nm, m.email, m.phone, m.gender_cd, m.birth_dt, m.social_cd, m.membership_cd, m.sub_status_cd, m.sub_plan_cd, m.sub_start_dt, m.sub_end_dt, m.sub_auto_yn, m.group_no, g.group_nm, m.group_role_cd, m.status_cd, m.grade_cd, m.point_bal, m.exp_total, m.exp_level, m.join_dt, m.last_login_dt, m.withdraw_dt, m.updated_at, c_sns.code_nm AS social_nm, c_mem.code_nm AS membership_nm, c_sub.code_nm AS sub_status_nm, c_grd.code_nm AS grade_nm
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM member m LEFT JOIN member_group g ON g.group_no = m.group_no
WHERE m.status_cd = 'ACTIVE'
ORDER BY m.join_dt DESC

SELECT FROM member m LEFT JOIN member_group g ON g.group_no = m.group_no
WHERE m.status_cd = 'WITHDRAWN'
ORDER BY m.withdraw_dt DESC

SELECT FROM member m LEFT JOIN member_group g ON g.group_no = m.group_no
WHERE m.status_cd = 'DORMANT'
ORDER BY m.updated_at DESC
